meta.title: Village Square Onboarding
meta.summary: A graph-authored onboarding arc that demonstrates gating, multiple choice, and freeform routing.

config.title: Scout Kaela Briefing
introLines: New arrivals survive longer when they understand the rhythm of Geneva. Listen once, remember it well.
Your champion acts in the world. You direct from the quest log, the map, and the command bridge.
config.readyPrompt: Are you ready to move from briefing to action?
config.readyLabel: I understand. Send me to Marcus.
config.completionText: Good. Guard Captain Marcus handles the first real work in the square. He will judge whether you're ready.
config.alreadyBriefedText: You've already had my briefing. Marcus is still your first stop.

config.title: Guard Captain Marcus Arrival
config.blockedText: Kaela hasn't cleared you yet. Get the briefing, then come back when you're ready to serve.
config.introText: If Kaela sent you, then speak plainly. The meadow is restless and I need hands that follow orders.
config.contextLabel: What should I know before I go?
config.freeformLabel: Let me ask in my own words.
config.hintText: Keep it simple. Start with the square, learn the meadow, and do not wander off before you can survive a mistake.
config.freeformText: Then ask. I have patience for clarity, not rambling.
config.freeformPlaceholder: Example: I'm ready for work. What's first?
config.freeformFallback: Marcus narrows his eyes. "That wasn't an answer. Speak clearly."
config.acceptedText: Then listen: start with the square and prove you can follow a chain of orders. Report back when the introductions are done.
config.declineText: Then stay out of my way until you're ready to act with purpose.
config.zoneEventMessage: Guard Captain Marcus briefed a new arrival and assigned their first welcome task.
